stemHtml: How does a polar-orbiting meteorological satellite differ from a geostationary satellite in terms of orbital altitude and the type of infrared radiation it detects?

options.a: It is at a higher altitude and uses short-wave IR only.
options.b: It is at a lower altitude and uses short-wave IR only.
options.c: It is at a lower altitude and uses both long-wave and short-wave IR.
options.d: It is at a higher altitude and uses long-wave IR only.
